utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Another cheesecake came ! They delivered it to the wrong address again !

emotion_cause.span: 2_They delivered it to the wrong address again !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So just bring it back downstairs , what the problem ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I can not seem to say goodbye .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I can not seem to say goodbye .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Are you serious ? ! Chandler , we ate an entire cheesecake two days ago and you want more ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_we ate an entire cheesecake two days ago and you want more ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well I have forgotten what it tastes like okay ? !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Are you serious ? ! Chandler , we ate an entire cheesecake two days ago and you want more ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It had a buttery , crumbly , graham cracker crust , with a very rich yet light , cream cheese filling ... Wow !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: My whole mouth just filled with saliva !

emotion_cause.span: 10_My whole mouth just filled with saliva !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know what ? Forget it ! We are just hungry ! We have not had lunch ! We are just light ... headed ! So let us go out and have lunch and forget about the cheesecake .

emotion_cause.span: 11_We are just hungry ! We have not had lunch ! We are just light ... headed !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah and we will drop it off downstairs so that we are not tempted .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Good idea . Where do you want to go to lunch ?
